items.quote: it shows not only is he a top-notch wrestler, elite wrestler

items.claim: Whitaker is undersized for the light heavyweight division.
items.quote: he's still going to be undersized potentially in this fight

items.claim: Whitaker will be stronger due to not cutting weight.
items.quote: not having to cut weight, he's going to be stronger

items.claim: Whitaker has been inactive for nearly 12 months.
items.quote: this fight will almost be just shy of 12 months when it kicks off

items.claim: Terrence McKini has not gone past the first round in his last seven fights.
items.quote: this guy hasn't been out of the first round in man about seven fights

items.claim: Terrence McKini's primary advantage is his ground and pound.
items.quote: I think Terrence McKini is going to land takedowns at some point and utilize the ground and pound. That's his weapon.

items.claim: Brandon Royval has a 45% takedown defense rate.
items.quote: Roy Val's got a 45% takedown defense

items.claim: Kavanaaugh has a 94% takedown defense rate.
items.quote: Kavanaaugh 94% takedown defense. That's impressive so far.

items.claim: Cory Sanhagen's takedown defense percentage dropped to 56% after the Merab Dvalishvili fight.
items.quote: Morav Devali came in and took him down 20 times. So, it dropped that thing way back down to 56%.
